Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product highlights to inform email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product details and pricing, eliminating manual content research that would take 30+ minutes daily.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email including subject line, body copy, and CTAs tailored to R1 Concepts brand voice and current inventory.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, conversion-optimized email copy in seconds, replacing the need for a dedicated copywriter and enabling consistent daily sends at scale.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot, assigns it to the appropriate contact list, and triggers the send via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the entire email build-and-send workflow within HubSpot, ensuring timely daily delivery to segmented audiences without manual intervention.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current Dynamic Friction Company product listings, featured parts, and promotional details from the DFC website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with the latest DFC inventory and offers, removing the manual effort of gathering product information each day.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a branded daily marketing email with subject line, promotional copy, and calls-to-action specific to DFC's audience and product line.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers fresh, high-quality email content daily without requiring a marketing copywriter, maintaining consistent brand messaging and driving engagement.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Builds the email campaign in HubSpot, targets the designated DFC contact lists, and dispatches the email through the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Fully automates campaign creation and distribution, ensuring DFC contacts receive timely daily emails with zero manual setup required.

R1 Support Agent.action: Retrieves new and open support tickets from HubSpot including ticket subject, description, customer history, and order details.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests into the AI workflow automatically, ensuring no tickets are missed and response times are dramatically reduced.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type (returns, fitment, shipping, warranty) and drafts a context-aware reply using customer history and DFC product knowledge.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Reduces support agent workload by pre-categorizing tickets and generating accurate draft responses, cutting average handling time by 60-70% per ticket.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-generated classification tag and attaches the draft reply for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Support agents receive pre-written, categorized responses ready for one-click approval, enabling faster resolutions and more consistent customer communication.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries, including reason codes, order IDs, and customer comments.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Automatically aggregates scattered customer issue data from Amazon packaging inserts into a single source, eliminating manual data export and ensuring nothing is overlooked.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the extracted issue data into a structured Google Sheet with organized columns for filtering, trend analysis, and team review.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the operations team a real-time, filterable dashboard of customer issues and return patterns, enabling data-driven product and packaging improvements.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Captures high-intent buying signals from existing DFC customers in real time, giving the sales team actionable intelligence on who is actively shopping.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Sales reps can immediately follow up with warm leads while interest is highest, significantly increasing conversion rates and reducing missed opportunities.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI assistant on R1 Concepts properties, handling product questions, order inquiries, and fitment lookups in real time.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide instant 24/7 customer support, reducing wait times and support ticket volume while improving the overall shopping experience.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will integrate with AI models and backend systems to generate accurate, context-aware responses and perform order lookups (platform selection in progress).
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will enable intelligent self-service that resolves common inquiries without human intervention, freeing support staff for complex escalations.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Performs keyword-based web searches to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles matching target niches and topics.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide initial net across the open web, uncovering creators that platform-only searches would miss and building a diverse candidate pool.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Enriches discovered creators with platform-specific data including subscriber counts, engagement rates, content categories, and posting frequency.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Provides quantitative creator metrics across multiple platforms, enabling data-driven evaluation instead of time-consuming manual research on each creator.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and consolidates creator profiles, filters for relevance, and compiles a structured list of discovery candidates with AI-generated summaries.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw search results into an organized, actionable creator shortlist in minutes, replacing hours of manual research and vetting per campaign.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighted criteria including audience relevance, engagement quality, content alignment, reach, and brand safety.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Objectively ranks creators using consistent, repeatable scoring, eliminating subjective bias and ensuring marketing budget is directed toward the highest-value partnerships.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, brand guidelines, and past campaign prompts stored in Google Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Grounds every outreach message in proven templates and brand-approved messaging, maintaining consistency and leveraging what has worked in previous campaigns.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using their profile data, learned sequences, and optimized prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, human-sounding outreach at scale, dramatically increasing response rates compared to generic templates while saving hours of manual writing.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators and tracks delivery, opens, and replies within the outreach sequence.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the full email send and tracking workflow, enabling the team to reach dozens of creators daily without manual email composition or send management.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies and retrieves full conversation threads including negotiation context and previous exchanges.
Creator Reponse.impact: Captures every creator response in real time, ensuring no reply is missed and providing the AI with complete conversation history for contextual follow-ups.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts context-aware replies using learned negotiation patterns, conversation history, and approved parameters to advance creator partnerships.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles ongoing creator conversations intelligently and at scale, reducing negotiation cycle time and maintaining professional, on-brand communication throughout the process.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted negotiation replies to creators and logs the updated conversation state for ongoing tracking.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps negotiations moving forward without delays, enabling the team to manage multiple creator conversations simultaneously with minimal manual effort.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify qualifying products.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual cross-referencing between vehicle datasets and availability lists, ensuring every qualifying part is captured without human error.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details, positioning, and brand voice guidelines.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including lead counts, conversion rates, and email performance data for the reporting period.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes current keyword rankings and identifies keyword gaps where competitors rank but R1 Concepts does not, building a prioritized content calendar.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Extracts historical sales data including order history, customer purchase patterns, product categories, and revenue figures for analysis.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen, detecting the weekly Super Session Saturday content.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly search performance data for DFC blog content including impressions, clicks, average position, and keyword rankings.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automatically harvests competitor catalog data that would take days to compile manually, ensuring comprehensive market coverage across three major brands.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references scraped competitor rotor listings against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps and opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC already competes and where whitespace exists in the two-piece rotor market, driving smarter stocking decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data and purchase interest for two-piece rotors across identified vehicle applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real demand signals from customers without manual outreach effort, validating which rotor applications are worth adding to inventory.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-references, and demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet for Dino to review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a complete, decision-ready catalog document that consolidates competitor intelligence, DFC coverage, and customer demand into one output.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting the full ad copy from every creative including headlines, body text, and descriptions.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility into every live ad without requiring manual review of each campaign, covering hundreds of ads in seconds.

Meta Investigation.action: Analyzes all extracted ad copy against a list of specified phrases, identifying exact matches and flagging the specific field and copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance risks, unapproved claims, or outdated messaging across all live ads instantly — a task that would take hours of manual auditing.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the flagged list to the requester with each match detailed — showing the campaign, ad, field, and exact copy containing the phrase.
Meta Investigation.impact: Enables the marketing team to act immediately on flagged ads with full context, reducing risk exposure and speeding up compliance remediation.
